main.description: Get a hydrated view of an external embed for one or more site.standard.* AT-URIs. Returns the view plus the strongRefs of records that backed it, suitable for embedding into a post's external.associatedRecords.

uris.description: AT-URIs of site.standard.* records to resolve. Typically a site.standard.document and optionally its associated site.standard.publication.

associatedRecords.description: StrongRefs (uri+cid) of the site.standard.* records that backed this view, suitable for embedding into a post's external.associatedRecords.
